tv.title: Jagur
tv.desc: Krishna, a medical student, fights for justice while trying to win the love of his friend's sister.

programme.title: Devaki Nandana Vasudeva
programme.desc: Driven by fear of an astrological prophecy, Kamsa torments his sister's family, convinced her child will cause his downfall. When imprisoned, Krishna shields the family from Kamsa's sinister schemes.
